reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros bueno y cordial

(Translated by Google)
The attention of the beach attendants was good and friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXcHVqNTBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de los playeros, los baños EXTREMADAMENTE SUCIOS, lástima ese detalle, ya que es una estación de servicios de Bandera YPF, tendrían que tener en excelentes condiciones, los turistas se fijan en eso y mas los extranjeros, es imagen de Argentina, en otros países de la región son tan limpios los baños que dan ganas de dormir adentro, TENGAN EN CUENTA ESTA OPINIÓN, no es de mala onda es simplemente la verdad lo que describí.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the attendants was very good, but the bathrooms were EXTREMELY DIRTY. It's a shame about that, since it's a YPF service station, they should be in excellent condition. Tourists notice that, especially foreigners; it's part of Argentina's image. In other countries in the region, the bathrooms are so clean you'd want to sleep in them. PLEASE TAKE THIS INTO ACCOUNT; it's not meant to be mean, it's simply the truth.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNnBMOV9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un oasis en la larga ruta. Esta muy bien. Lo mas lindo es la sombra a su lado. Faltaria renovar el shop

(Translated by Google)
An oasis on the long road. It's very nice. The best part is the shade beside it. The shop needs updating.

reviews.comment:
Sigue como hace 20 años atrás: pésima atención, baños sucios, poca variedad de productos en el full y caro.

(Translated by Google)
It's still the same as it was 20 years ago: terrible service, dirty bathrooms, little variety of products in the full section and expensive.

reviews.comment:
Vi un solo playero...no consegui la super...pero me permitio seguir viaje con la infinia...y bueno..alcanza con eso..

(Translated by Google)
I saw only one beachcomber...I didn't get the super...but it allowed me to continue traveling with the infinia...and well...that's enough...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXeUpLSlNBEAE

reviews.comment:
El único como la gente, el playero, un divino. El que atiende el drugstore mal gestado, mala onda, cero amabilidad, después se quejan porque no tienen trabajo!
Las instalaciones muy pobres, un solo baño para mujeres!! Llego un micro y habías una cola que interfería con los autos que cargaban...un lío

(Translated by Google)
The only one who was nice was the beach attendant, a sweetheart. The guy who works at the drugstore was rude, unfriendly, and had zero kindness. Then they complain about not having jobs!
The facilities are terrible, only one bathroom for women! A bus arrived and there was a line of them blocking the cars that were loading...a total mess.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXME1pNnFRRRAB
